title: blechnum auriculatum var. trilobum
intro: Blechnum auriculatum var. trilobum, also known as the ear-leaved chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Blechnum auriculatum var. trilobum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
